steps.title: Set up the price system
steps.content:
Let $r$ be pints of raspberries and $b$ be pints of blackberries.
$$5.50r+3.00b=37.00$$
$$6.50r+8.00b=66.00$$

steps.title: Eliminate raspberries
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by $13$ and the second by $11$.
$$143r+78b=962$$
$$143r+176b=1{,}452$$
Subtract to get $98b=490$, so $b=5$.

steps.title: Match the number of pints
steps.content: The purchase includes $5$ pints of blackberries. The answer is B.
